name: Fiduagraria
message: Fiduagraria is a joint-stock company of a mixed economy, subject to the State regime of an industrial and commercial enterprise, in accordance with the national order, associated with the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development, under the control and supervision of the Financial Administration of Colombia and legally registered on the basis of Public Act No. 1199 of February 18, 1992 with the main address in the city of Bogota.
